mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (payment_id, attend_date, status) SELECT p.payment_id, CURDATE(), '결석' FROM payment p INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM attendance a WHERE a.payment_id = p.payment_id AND a.attend_date = CURDATE() )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT u.name AS studentName, s.name AS subjectName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, c.name AS classroomName, IFNULL(a.status, '결석') AS status, IFNULL(a.attend_date, CURDATE()) AS attendDate, a.attendance_id AS attendanceId, p.payment_id FROM payment p JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id JOIN user u ON u.user_id = se.student_id JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = se.lecture_id JOIN subject s ON s.subject_id = l.subject_id JOIN classroom c ON l.classroom_id = c.classroom_id LEFT JOIN attendance a ON a.payment_id = p.payment_id AND DATE(a.attend_date) = CURDATE() WHERE l.lecture_id IN ( SELECT lecture_id FROM teacher_assignment WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} ) AND l.day_of_week = CASE DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%w') WHEN '0' THEN '일' WHEN '1' THEN '월' WHEN '2' THEN '화' WHEN '3' THEN '수' WHEN '4' THEN '목' WHEN '5' THEN '금' WHEN '6' THEN '토' END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (payment_id, status, attend_date) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{status}, CURDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT lecture_id FROM lecture WHERE day_of_week = ( CASE DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%w') WHEN '0' THEN '일' WHEN '1' THEN '월' WHEN '2' THEN '화' WHEN '3' THEN '수' WHEN '4' THEN '목' WHEN '5' THEN '금' WHEN '6' THEN '토' END )
